function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-23
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-23                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file was updated successfully with schema-compliant frontmatter and preserved body. Reactive outbox-check context is not applicable because this was not an outbox write. Next required cleanup: delete processed inbox item (already read).
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report with grounding refs
next_step.observation: Write to the target invoice path completed without error.

details:
1 validation error for NextStep
plan_remaining_steps_brief
  List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0 [type=too_short, input_value=[], input_type=list]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/too_short

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit check: Task asked to review next inbound note and act. I processed lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md, extracted visible invoice data into required YAML frontmatter for the exact requested file, preserved original body text verbatim beneath frontmatter, then deleted inbox item per inbox workflow. Completeness: inbox note specified one file only, and that one was processed. Numeric consistency: line totals 185+240+105=530, matching total_eur 530.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after completing the requested invoice frontmatter migration.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item: added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_23__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md using visible note data, preserved the existing note body below frontmatter, and deleted the handled inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read 99_system workflows/schemas before task work, used OCR/migration guidance, preserved full original body under frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR and add YAML frontmatter to one invoice file. The target file contained all required invoice fields and line items defined by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling a complete, non-guessing update. After write success, inbox cleanup was required by process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
